title: Standing 2 Arm Dumbbell Curls to Overhead Presses 45 lbs 1stx 16X

transcript.text: Okay, it's like the first time lifting weights for like two months, so I think I'm strong.
At least this is the first time I have to do this exercise, so there's nothing to break, nothing to live up to.
I'll go for ten at least.
Not for the first time, I think.
I don't want to kill myself.
